scope.target: Finalize the portable baseline after legacy decision retirement
scope.dependency_radius: Repo-level governance and portable packaging docs
constraints: Do not restore .dev/adr/ as a canonical rules surface
Keep the main rule surface in architecture, standards, guides, and .ai

inputs.architecture_target: Preserve ADR governance while keeping canonical rules outside the ADR folder
review_findings: .dev/adr/ should contain template, index, and when-to-create rules

steps: Reframed .dev/adr/ as ADR governance rather than rule source
Updated repo-level packaging and index docs to describe the new ADR role
validation: Canonical rule docs still live outside .dev/adr/
Portable packaging docs describe the keep-vs-rebuild boundary correctly
deferred_items: Optionally add an ADR example file later if the repo wants a filled sample
Optionally add a generated checklist to enforce ADR creation triggers

results.summary: Finalized the portable baseline by keeping .dev/adr/ as an ADR governance layer with template, index, and creation rules.
